description: Schema fixture for migration 017_advisor_observations.sql. Each entry describes one column's constraints. Used by test_advisor_observations_schema_fixture_matches_live_db to cross-check PRAGMA table_info against this declared expectation.

columns.name: id
columns.note: INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT — SQLite does not mark PK as notnull in PRAGMA table_info

columns.name: advisor_role
columns.note: Discriminator: OVERFITTING_CONSCIENCE | SPEC_CRITIC | DIVERGENCE_EXPLAINER | NARRATOR | WALL_BREACH

columns.name: subject_id
columns.note: Soft FK into the subject table — not enforced by SQLite

columns.name: verdict
columns.note: Nullable — computed verdict label or NULL for placeholder rows

columns.name: raw_response
columns.note: DEFAULT '{}' — JSON blob; empty dict for computed rows, populated for LLM-authored rows

columns.name: is_advisory_only
columns.note: DEFAULT 1 — hard-wired structural declaration; accessor enforces value=1 always

columns.name: spec_bundle_id
columns.note: Soft FK to spec_bundles.bundle_hash; NULL when not applicable
